metadata.title: Outplaying a 2v2 on Split with Smart Positioning and Calm Aim
metadata.description:
Watch a tight 2v2 on Split where smart angles and steady aim turn the tide. Timing and positioning make all the difference here.
What’s your favorite clutch spot on Split?

#shorts #valorant

Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!
